statement: The completed nonnegative repaired form descends to a nonnegative self-adjoint trace-side form D_aug on X_aug.  The interval finite repair constants give the transported operator-norm upper bound.

transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with transported quotient norm

operatorBound.source: interval dMaxUpper from the finite Schur repair constants

nonnegativeClosedFormLimitInputStatus.label: nonnegative closed-form limit input
nonnegativeClosedFormLimitInputStatus.reason: The completed repaired form is the nonnegative closed-form limit.

finiteRepairOperatorBoundInputStatus.label: finite repair operator bound input
finiteRepairOperatorBoundInputStatus.reason: The interval constants enclose the finite D_aug,N upper spectral endpoint.

DaugTraceFormRepresentationStatus.label: D_aug trace-side representation
DaugTraceFormRepresentationStatus.reason: The descended nonnegative closed form on X_aug is represented by D_aug, and the interval upper endpoint supplies the bounded trace-side form estimate.

proof: Import the nonnegative closed-form limit theorem.
Use the trace repair descent built into that theorem to put the form on X_aug.
Use the interval dMaxUpper constant to bound the trace-side form in the transported quotient norm.
Represent the bounded nonnegative trace form by its self-adjoint positive operator D_aug.
